steps.title: Find the explicit detail
steps.content: The passage directly states that Hooks and Ward met while performing in a touring production of A Raisin in the Sun.

steps.title: Match the detail to the choices
steps.content: D directly aligns with the passage: they met while both performing in A Raisin in the Sun. Choices A, B, and C reference different settings or circumstances not mentioned in the text. That matches choice D — D is correct.
